160101.cherokee: ᎠᏴ ᏉᎳ ᎠᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎣᏏ ᎤᏰᎸᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎠᏚᎢᏍᏛ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎡᎩᏁᏗᏱ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᏨᏗᏓᎴᎲᏍᎦ;
160101.english: Paul, an apostle of Jesus Christ by the will of God, according to the promise of life which is in Christ Jesus,
160101.phonetic: A-yv Quo-la a-gi-nv-si-dv Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv U-ne-la-nv-hi o-si u-ye-lv-nv-i, na-s-gi-ya a-du-i-s-dv gv-ni-dv e-gi-ne-di-yi, na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa tsv-di-da-le-hv-s-ga;

160102.cherokee: ᏫᎬᏲᏪᎳᏏ ᏗᎹᏗ ᎬᎨᏳᎢ ᎠᏇᏥ; ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏣᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᏕᏣᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎢᎩᏙᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎢᎦᏤᎵ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ.
160102.english: To Timothy, my dearly beloved son: Grace, mercy, and peace, from God the Father and Christ Jesus our Lord.
160102.phonetic: Wi-gv-yo-we-la-si Di-ma-di gv-ge-yu-i a-que-tsi; gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv a-le u-da-do-li-tsa-dv ge-sv a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv de-tsa-ka-hna-wa-di-do-he-s-di nv-da-yu-na-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi I-gi-do-da a-le Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa i-ga-tse-li U-gv-wi-yu-hi.

160103.cherokee: ᏥᏯᎵᎡᎵᏤ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏕᏥᏯᏁᎶᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏗᎩᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏄᎾᏛᏁᎸᎢ, ᏥᎬᏗᎭ ᎦᏓᎭ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏆᏓᏅᏙ, ᏂᏥᏲᎯᏍᏗᏍᎬᎾ, ᎢᎦ ᎠᎴ ᏒᏃᏱ ᎬᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᎬ ᎦᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗᏍᎬᎢ,
160103.english: I thank God, whom I serve from my forefathers with pure conscience, that without ceasing I have remembrance of thee in my prayers night and day;
160103.phonetic: Tsi-ya-li-e-li-tse U-ne-la-nv-hi, na-s-gi tsi-de-tsi-ya-ne-lo-di, na-s-gi-ya di-gi-ga-yv-li-ge nu-na-dv-ne-lv-i, tsi-gv-di-ha ga-da-ha ni-ge-sv-na a-qua-da-nv-do, ni-tsi-yo-hi-s-di-s-gv-na, i-ga a-le sv-no-yi gv-ya-nv-da-di-s-gv ga-da-do-li-s-di-s-gv-i,

160104.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎠᏆᏚᎵᏍᎬ ᎬᎪᏩᏛᏗᏱ, ᎠᎴ ᎦᏅᏓᏗᏍᎬ ᏕᏣᏠᏱᎸᎢ ᎾᏍᎩᏃ ᎠᎩᎧᎵᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᎵᎮᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ,
160104.english: Greatly desiring to see thee, being mindful of thy tears, that I may be filled with joy;
160104.phonetic: Na-s-gi u-tsa-ti a-qua-du-li-s-gv gv-go-wa-dv-di-yi, a-le ga-nv-da-di-s-gv de-tsa-tlo-yi-lv-i na-s-gi-no a-gi-ka-li-i-s-di-yi u-li-he-li-s-di ge-sv-i,

160105.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎦᏅᏓᏓ ᎤᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏥᏣᏯᎠ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎬᏱ ᏧᏯᎥ ᏣᎵᏏ ᎶᏏ ᎠᎴ ᏣᏥ ᏳᏂᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᏄᏜᏓᏏᏛᏒᎾ ᎠᎩᏰᎸᎭ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏣᏯᎥᎢ.
160105.english: When I call to remembrance the unfeigned faith that is in thee, which dwelt first in thy grandmother Lois, and thy mother Eunice; and I am persuaded that in thee also.
160105.phonetic: I-yu-no ga-nv-da-da u-tlo-na-s-di ni-ge-sv-na go-hi-yu-di ge-sv tsi-tsa-ya-a, na-s-gi i-gv-yi tsu-ya-v tsa-li-si Lo-si a-le tsa-tsi Yu-ni-si, a-le nu-dla-si-dv-sv-na a-gi-ye-lv-ha ni-hi na-s-quo tsa-ya-v-i.

160106.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎬᏯᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᎭ ᏣᏖᎸᏗᏱ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎩ ᏣᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏣᏯᎠ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎬᏯᏏᏔᏛ ᏥᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ.
160106.english: Wherefore I put thee in remembrance that thou stir up the gift of God, which is in thee by the putting on of my hands.
160106.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di gv-ya-nv-da-di-s-di-ha tsa-te-lv-di-yi U-ne-la-nv-gi tsa-ne-lv-hi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi tsi-tsa-ya-a, na-s-gi de-gv-ya-si-ta-dv tsi-nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha.

160107.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏰᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎩᏁᎸ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎤᏓᏍᎦᏍᏗ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
160107.english: For God hath not given us the spirit of fear; but of power, and of love, and of a sound mind.
160107.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi-ye-no v-tla yi-gi-ne-lv a-da-nv-do u-da-s-ga-s-di, u-li-ni-gi-dv-s-gi-ni a-le a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv a-le o-s-dv a-da-nv-te-di ge-sv-i.

160108.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏯᏕᎰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎯᏃᎮᏍᎬ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎢᎦᏤᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᏞᏍᏗ ᏱᏍᏆᏕᎰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏴ ᏥᏴᎩ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ, ᏤᎳᏗᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᎩᎵᏲᎬ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᏣᏍᏕᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ,
160108.english: Be not thou therefore ashamed of the testimony of our Lord, nor of me his prisoner: but be thou partaker of the afflictions of the gospel according to the power of God;
160108.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di tle-s-di ya-de-ho-s-ge-s-di hi-no-he-s-gv u-gv-wi-yu-hi i-ga-tse-li-ga, a-le tle-s-di yi-s-qua-de-ho-s-ge-s-di a-yv tsi-yv-gi na-s-gi u-tse-li-ga, tse-la-di-s-di-s-ge-s-di-s-gi-ni a-gi-li-yo-gv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv, tsa-s-de-li-s-ge-s-di u-li-ni-gi-di ge-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi,

160109.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᏍᏕᎸᏛ ᏥᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎢᎩᏯᏅᏛ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏩᏔᏅᎯ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎠᏓᏯᏅᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᏴ ᏕᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᏱᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ, ᎤᏩᏒᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏧᎵᏍᏙᏔᏅ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᎩᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᏅᏧᏓᎴᏅᎲᎾ, ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ,
160109.english: Who hath saved us, and called us with an holy calling, not according to our works, but according to his own purpose and grace, which was given us in Christ Jesus before the world began,
160109.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-gi-s-de-lv-dv tsi-gi, a-le i-gi-ya-nv-dv tsi-gi u-wa-ta-nv-hi ga-lv-quo-di a-da-ya-nv-di ge-sv-i, v-tla a-yv de-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv yi-nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv, u-wa-sv-s-gi-ni u-da-nv-te-lv-i a-le gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv nv-tsu-li-s-do-ta-nv, na-s-gi i-gi-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi nv-tsu-da-le-nv-hv-na, Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv ge-sv i-yu-s-di,

160110.cherokee: ᎪᎯᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏥᎸ ᎢᎩᏍᏕᎵᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᏲᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏲᎱᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎬᏔᏅᎯ,
160110.english: But is now made manifest by the appearing of our Saviour Jesus Christ, who hath abolished death, and hath brought life and immortality to light through the gospel:
160110.phonetic: Go-hi-no ge-sv gv-ni-ge-sv i-gv-ne-lv-hi na-s-gi u-na-nu-go-tsi-lv I-gi-s-de-li-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, na-s-gi u-yo-s-ta-nv-hi tsi-gi a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ge-sv, a-le u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi tsi-gi gv-ni-dv a-le a-yo-hu-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv, o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv gv-ta-nv-hi,

160111.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎥᎩᏁᏤᎸᎯ ᎦᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎥᎩᏅᏏᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏗᎦᏥᏰᏲᎲᏍᎩ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ.
160111.english: Whereunto I am appointed a preacher, and an apostle, and a teacher of the Gentiles.
160111.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-yv v-gi-ne-tse-lv-hi ga-li-tsi-do-hv-s-gi a-le v-gi-nv-si-dv a-le di-ga-tsi-ye-yo-hv-s-gi tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi.

160112.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏥᎩᎵᏲᎦ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᏱᎦᏕᎣᏍᎦ; ᏥᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏥᏯᎵᏍᎦᏍᏙᏔᏅ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᎠᏉᎯᏳᎭ ᏰᎵᏉ ᎬᏩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏥᏯᎨᏅᏴ ᎬᏂ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ ᎠᏍᏆᎸᎲᎭ.
160112.english: For the which cause I also suffer these things: nevertheless I am not ashamed: for I know whom I have believed, and am persuaded that he is able to keep that which I have committed unto him against that day.
160112.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-s-quo nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha hi-a na-s-gi tsu-da-le-nv-dv tsi-gi-li-yo-ga; a-se-no v-tla yi-ga-de-o-s-ga; tsi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no na-s-gi tsi-tsi-ya-li-s-ga-s-do-ta-nv, a-le u-li-ni-gi-di-yu a-quo-hi-yu-ha ye-li-quo gv-wa-s-qua-ni-go-do-di ge-sv na-s-gi tsi-tsi-ya-ge-nv-yv gv-ni na-hi-yu i-ga a-s-qua-lv-hv-ha.

160113.cherokee: ᏕᏣᏂᏴᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏗᏣᏟᎶᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏍᏆᏛᎦᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ, ᎲᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᏅᏓᏳᏓᎴᏅᎯ.
160113.english: Hold fast the form of sound words, which thou hast heard of me, in faith and love which is in Christ Jesus.
160113.phonetic: De-tsa-ni-yv-se-s-di na-s-gi di-tsa-tli-lo-s-ta-nv-hi o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv na-s-gi s-qua-dv-ga-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi, hv-di-s-ge-s-di go-hi-yu-di ge-sv a-le a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv na-s-gi Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa nv-da-yu-da-le-nv-hi.

160114.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏤᏣᎨᏅᏴ ᏣᏍᏆᏂᎪᏕᏍᏗ, ᏣᏍᏕᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎠᏓᏅᏙ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᎩᏯᎠ.
160114.english: That good thing which was committed unto thee keep by the Holy Ghost which dwelleth in us.
160114.phonetic: Na-s-gi na o-s-dv tse-tsa-ge-nv-yv tsa-s-qua-ni-go-de-s-di, tsa-s-de-li-s-ge-s-di Ga-lv-quo-di-yu A-da-nv-do na-s-gi tsi-gi-ya-a.

160115.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᎦᏔᎭ, ᏂᎦᏛ ᎡᏏᏱ ᎠᏁᎯ ᎬᏋᏕᏨᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏓᏑᏯ ᏆᏤᎳ ᎠᎴ ᎭᎹᏥᏂ.
160115.english: This thou knowest, that all they which are in Asia be turned away from me; of whom are Phygellus and Hermogenes.
160115.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi hi-ga-ta-ha, ni-ga-dv E-si-yi a-ne-hi gv-quv-de-tsv-i, na-s-gi u-na-da-su-ya Qua-tse-la a-le Ha-ma-tsi-ni.

160116.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏧᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏚᏓᏘᎿᎭᎥ ᎣᏁᏏᏉᎳ, ᏯᏃᏰᏃ ᎠᎩᎦᎵᏍᏓᏗᏍᎬᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎥᏝ ᏯᏉᏕᎰᎯᏎᎮ ᎠᏆᏤᎵ ᏧᏓᏕᏒᏛ;
160116.english: The Lord give mercy unto the house of Onesiphorus; for he oft refreshed me, and was not ashamed of my chain:
160116.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi tsu-ne-di ge-se-s-di u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv du-da-ti-hna-v O-ne-si-quo-la, ya-no-ye-no a-gi-ga-li-s-da-di-s-gv-gi, a-le v-tla ya-quo-de-ho-hi-se-he a-qua-tse-li tsu-da-de-sv-dv;

160117.cherokee: ᎶᎻᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏪᏙᎸ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛ ᎠᎩᏲᎸᎩ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎩᏩᏛᎲᎩ.
160117.english: But, when he was in Rome, he sought me out very diligently, and found me.
160117.phonetic: Lo-mi-s-gi-ni u-we-do-lv u-li-ni-gi-dv a-gi-yo-lv-gi, a-le a-gi-wa-dv-hv-gi.

160118.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᏁᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎤᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ.  ᎠᎴ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎠᎩᏍᏕᎸᎯᏙᎸ ᎡᏈᏌ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎯᎦᏔᎭ.
160118.english: The Lord grant unto him that he may find mercy of the Lord in that day: and in how many things he ministered unto me at Ephesus, thou knowest very well.
160118.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-ne-di ge-se-s-di u-wa-dv-di-yi u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv U-gv-wi-yu-hi na-hi-yu i-ga.  A-le ni-ga-v a-gi-s-de-lv-hi-do-lv E-qui-sa o-si-yu hi-ga-ta-ha.

160201.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎠᏇᏥ ᏣᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎬᏩᎦᏘᏯ ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ.
160201.english: Thou therefore, my son, be strong in the grace that is in Christ Jesus.
160201.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-hi a-que-tsi tsa-li-ni-go-hi-s-di-s-ge-s-di gv-wa-ga-ti-ya u-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv na-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv nv-da-yu-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi.

160202.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏍᏆᏛᎦᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏂᏣᏘ ᎠᏂᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎭᎨᏅᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᏃᏍᏛ ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᏗᎬᏩᏁᏲᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎾᏍᏉ Ꮎ ᏭᏅᎫᏛᎢ.
160202.english: And the things that thou hast heard of me among many witnesses, the same commit thou to faithful men, who shall be able to teach others also.
160202.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi s-qua-dv-ga-ne-lv-hi tsi-gi u-ni-tsa-ti a-ni-ga-ta-hv-i, na-s-gi de-ha-ge-nv-di-s-ge-s-di a-no-s-dv a-ni-s-ga-ya na-s-gi ye-li di-gv-wa-ne-yo-di ge-sv na-s-quo na wu-nv-gu-dv-i.

160203.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᏂᎯ ᎲᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎯᎩᎵᏲᎬᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᏯᏫᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ.
160203.english: Thou therefore endure hardness, as a good soldier of Jesus Christ.
160203.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di ni-hi hv-ni-di-yu ge-se-s-di hi-gi-li-yo-gv-i, na-s-gi-ya o-s-dv a-ya-wi-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv u-tse-li-ga.

160204.cherokee: ᎩᎶ ᏓᎿᎭᏩ ᏤᎪᎢ ᎥᏝ ᎬᏅ ᎤᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᏕᎤᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲ ᏯᏚᏓᎸᏗᏍᎪᎢ, ᎤᏚᎵᏍᎪ ᎠᏍᎦᏰᎬᏍᏓ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎤᏰᎸᏗ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗᏱ.
160204.english: No man that warreth entangleth himself with the affairs of this life; that he may please him who hath chosen him to be a soldier.
160204.phonetic: Gi-lo da-hna-wa tse-go-i v-tla gv-nv u-li-s-de-lv-do-di de-u-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv ya-du-da-lv-di-s-go-i, u-du-li-s-go a-s-ga-ye-gv-s-da o-s-dv u-ye-lv-di tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di-yi.

160205.cherokee: ᎢᏳ ᎠᎴ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏓᏎᎪᎩᏍᏗᏱ ᏣᏟᏂᎬᏁᎰᎢ, ᎥᏝ ᏯᏥᏍᏚᎸᏍᎪᎢ ᎬᏂ ᏗᎧᎿᎭᏩᏛᏍᏗ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎢᏳᏛᏁᎸᎯ ᏥᎨᏐᎢ.
160205.english: And if a man also strive for masteries, yet is he not crowned, except he strive lawfully.
160205.phonetic: I-yu a-le gi-lo u-da-se-go-gi-s-di-yi tsa-tli-ni-gv-ne-ho-i, v-tla ya-tsi-s-du-lv-s-go-i gv-ni di-ka-hna-wa-dv-s-di ni-gv-nv i-yu-dv-ne-lv-hi tsi-ge-so-i.

160206.cherokee: ᏗᎦᎶᎩᏍᎩ ᏥᏚᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎰᎢ ᎢᎬᏱ ᎤᏪᎳᏗᏍᏙᏗ ᎨᏐ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᏫᏒᎯ.
160206.english: The husbandman that laboureth must be first partaker of the fruits.
160206.phonetic: Di-ga-lo-gi-s-gi tsi-du-lv-wi-s-da-ne-ho-i i-gv-yi u-we-la-di-s-do-di ge-so u-na-nu-go-wi-sv-hi.

160207.cherokee: ᎭᏓᏅᏓᏛᎵ ᎯᎠ ᏥᏂᏥᏪᎭ; ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏃ ᏫᏣᎲᏏ ᏣᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ.
160207.english: Consider what I say; and the Lord give thee understanding in all things.
160207.phonetic: Ha-da-nv-da-dv-li hi-a tsi-ni-tsi-we-ha; U-gv-wi-yu-hi-no wi-tsa-hv-si tsa-ga-do-v-hi-s-di-yi ni-ga-v tsu-da-le-nv-dv.

160208.cherokee: ᏣᏅᏖᏍᏗ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᏕᏫ ᎤᏪᏥ, ᎤᏲᎱᏒ ᏚᎴᎯᏌᏅᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏂᎦᏪᏍᎬ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎠᏆᏤᎵᎦ,
160208.english: Remember that Jesus Christ of the seed of David was raised from the dead according to my gospel:
160208.phonetic: Tsa-nv-te-s-di Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, De-wi u-we-tsi, u-yo-hu-sv du-le-hi-sa-nv-i, na-s-gi-ya ni-ga-we-s-gv o-s-dv ka-no-he-dv a-qua-tse-li-ga,

160209.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎾᎿ ᎭᏥᏥᎩᎵᏲᎦ ᎥᏆᎸᏍᏗᏱ ᎢᏴᏛ, ᎤᏲ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎾᏍᎩᏯᎢ; ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ ᎥᏝ ᎦᎸᎸᎯ ᏱᎩ.
160209.english: Wherein I suffer trouble, as an evil doer, even unto bonds; but the word of God is not bound.
160209.phonetic: Na-s-gi na-hna tsi-tsi-gi-li-yo-ga v-qua-lv-s-di-yi i-yv-dv, u-yo tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi na-s-gi-ya-i; U-ne-la-nv-hi-s-gi-ni u-tse-li-ga ka-no-he-dv v-tla ga-lv-lv-hi yi-gi.

160210.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎨᎵᎭ ᏂᎦᏛ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎾᏆᎵᏍᏓᏁᎵᏙᎲᎢ ᎨᎦᏑᏰᏛ ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎤᏂᏩᏛᏗᏱ ᎠᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏅᏓᏳᎵᏍᎪᎸᏔᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᎵᏍᏆᏗᏍᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎦᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ.
160210.english: Therefore I endure all things for the elect's sakes, that they may also obtain the salvation which is in Christ Jesus with eternal glory.
160210.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di u-ne-la-gi ge-li-ha ni-ga-dv tsu-da-le-nv-dv na-qua-li-s-da-ne-li-do-hv-i ge-ga-su-ye-dv nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha, a-le u-ni-wa-dv-di-yi a-li-s-de-lv-do-di na-s-gi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv nv-da-yu-li-s-go-lv-ta-nv-hi, a-le a-li-s-qua-di-s-gi ni-ge-sv-na ga-lv-quo-di-yu ge-sv-i.

160211.cherokee: ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯᏯ ᎢᎦᏪᏛ, ᎢᏳᏰᏃ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏗᎩᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᏎ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᏕᏛᏁᏍᏗ;
160211.english: It is a faithful saying: For if we be dead with him, we shall also live with him:
160211.phonetic: U-do-hi-yu-hi-ya i-ga-we-dv, I-yu-ye-no i-tsu-la-ha di-gi-yo-hu-sv-hi ge-se-s-di, a-se na-s-quo i-tsu-la-ha de-dv-ne-s-di;

160212.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏕᏛᏂᎡᏍᏗ ᎠᏎ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏧᎳᎭ ᎢᎩᎬᏫᏳᏌᏕᎨᏍᏗ; ᎢᏳᏃ ᎢᏒᏓᏓᏱᎸᎭ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎠᏎ ᏓᎦᏓᏱᎵ.
160212.english: If we suffer, we shall also reign with him: if we deny him, he also will deny us:
160212.phonetic: I-yu-no de-dv-ni-e-s-di a-se na-s-gi i-tsu-la-ha i-gi-gv-wi-yu-sa-de-ge-s-di; i-yu-no i-sv-da-da-yi-lv-ha na-s-quo a-se da-ga-da-yi-li.

160213.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᏁᏙᎢᏳᏅᎾ ᎢᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏎ ᏅᏩᏍᏗᏉ ᎦᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎥᏝ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏴᎬᏓᏓᏱᎦ.
160213.english: If we believe not, yet he abideth faithful: he cannot deny himself.
160213.phonetic: I-yu-no ne-do-i-yu-nv-na i-ge-se-s-di a-se nv-wa-s-di-quo ga-go-hi-yu-di ge-sv-i; v-tla u-wa-sv yv-gv-da-da-yi-ga.

160214.cherokee: ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏕᎭᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏛᏯ ᏕᎯᏁᏤᎮᏍᏗ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ, ᎤᎾᏗᏒᏍᏗᏱ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒ ᏓᏂᏬᏂᏍᎬᎢ, ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎬᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᏥᎩ, ᏓᏂᎦᏔᎲᏍᎬᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏩᎾᏛᏓᏍᏓᏁᎯ.
160214.english: Of these things put them in remembrance, charging them before the Lord that they strive not about words to no profit, but to the subverting of the hearers.
160214.phonetic: Hi-a na-s-gi de-ha-nv-da-di-s-di-s-ge-s-di, u-li-ni-gi-dv-ya de-hi-ne-tse-he-s-di U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i, u-na-di-sv-s-di-yi ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv da-ni-wo-ni-s-gv-i, go-hu-s-di gv-do-di ni-ge-sv-na tsi-gi, da-ni-ga-ta-hv-s-gv-quo-s-gi-ni gv-wa-na-dv-da-s-da-ne-hi.

160215.cherokee: ᎭᏟᏂᎬᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᎢᏨᏁᏗᏱ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏣᏰᎸᏒ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ, ᏗᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎨᏣᏕᎰᎯᏍᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎣᏍᏛ ᏘᏯᏙᎮᎯ ᎦᏰᎪᎩ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ.
160215.english: Study to shew thyself approved unto God, a workman that needeth not to be ashamed, rightly dividing the word of truth.
160215.phonetic: Ha-tli-ni-gv-ne-he-s-di gv-ni-ge-sv i-tsv-ne-di-yi o-si-yu tsa-ye-lv-sv U-ne-la-nv-hi, di-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hi ge-se-s-di ge-tsa-de-ho-hi-s-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i, o-s-dv ti-ya-do-he-hi ga-ye-go-gi ni-ge-sv-na ka-no-he-dv.

160216.cherokee: ᎢᏴᏛᏍᎩᏂ ᏅᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎦᏪᏢᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏄᎵᏌᎶᏛᎾ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎠᏂᏁᏉᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏁᎶᏙᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏒᎢ,
160216.english: But shun profane and vain babblings: for they will increase unto more ungodliness.
160216.phonetic: I-yv-dv-s-gi-ni nv-ne-he-s-di ga-we-tlv-di ge-sv a-le nu-li-sa-lo-dv-na ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, na-s-gi-ye-no a-ni-ne-quo-s-ge-s-di U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ne-lo-do-di ni-ge-sv-na ge-sv-i,

160217.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎠᏂᏬᏂᏍᎬ ᎠᏓᏰᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎤᎪᏏᏛ ᏣᏓᏰᏍᎪᎢ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᏄᎾᏍᏗ ᎭᎻᏂᏯ ᎠᎴ ᏆᎵᏓ,
160217.english: And their word will eat as doth a canker: of whom is Hymenaeus and Philetus;
160217.phonetic: A-le a-ni-wo-ni-s-gv a-da-ye-s-ge-s-di na-s-gi-ya u-go-si-dv tsa-da-ye-s-go-i; na-s-gi nu-na-s-di Ha-mi-ni-ya a-le Qua-li-da,

160218.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎾᏞᏒ, ᎯᎠ ᏥᎾᏂᏪᎠ, ᎠᏲᎱᏒ ᏗᎴᎯᏐᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎦᏳᎳ ᎤᎶ ᏐᏅ; ᎠᎴ ᏓᏂᎷᏆᏗᏁᎭ ᎢᎦᏛ ᎤᏃᎯᏳᏒᎢ.
160218.english: Who concerning the truth have erred, saying that the resurrection is past already; and overthrow the faith of some.
160218.phonetic: Na-s-gi du-yu-go-dv ge-sv u-na-tle-sv, hi-a tsi-na-ni-we-a, a-yo-hu-sv di-le-hi-so-di ge-sv ga-yu-la u-lo so-nv; a-le da-ni-lu-qua-di-ne-ha i-ga-dv u-no-hi-yu-sv-i.

160219.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎦᎫᏍᏛᏗ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳ ᏂᎬᏅ; ᎯᎠᏰᏃ ᏂᎬᏅ ᎪᏪᎸᎢ, ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏓᎦᏔᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏤᎵᎦ; ᎠᎴ ᎯᎠ, ᎩᎶ ᎧᏁᎢᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏚᏙᎥ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏓᏅᎡᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᏍᎦᏂ.
160219.english: Nevertheless the foundation of God standeth sure, having this seal, The Lord knoweth them that are his. And, Let every one that nameth the name of Christ depart from iniquity.
160219.phonetic: A-se-s-gi-ni-no-nv ga-gu-s-dv-di U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga u-li-ni-gi-di-yu ni-gv-nv; hi-a-ye-no ni-gv-nv go-we-lv-i, U-gv-wi-yu-hi da-ga-ta-ha na-s-gi tsu-tse-li-ga; a-le hi-a, Gi-lo ka-ne-i-s-di-s-ge-s-di Ga-lo-ne-dv du-do-v na-s-gi a-da-nv-e-he-s-di a-s-ga-ni.

160220.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎡᏆ ᏣᏓᏁᎶ ᎾᎿᎭᏓᎰ ᏗᏖᎵᏙ ᎥᏝ ᎠᏕᎸᏉ ᏓᎶᏂᎨ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏕᎸᎤᏁᎬ ᎤᏩᏒ ᏗᎪᏢᏔᏅᎯ ᏱᎨᏐᎢ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎠᏓ ᎠᎴ ᎦᏓ ᏗᎪᏢᏔᏅᎯ; ᎠᎴ ᎢᎦᏛ ᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎢᎦᏛᏃ ᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.
160220.english: But in a great house there are not only vessels of gold and of silver, but also of wood and of earth; and some to honour, and some to dishonour.
160220.phonetic: A-se-no e-qua tsa-da-ne-lo na-hna da-ho di-te-li-do v-tla a-de-lv-quo da-lo-ni-ge a-le a-de-lv-u-ne-gv u-wa-sv di-go-tlv-ta-nv-hi yi-ge-so-i, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni a-da a-le ga-da di-go-tlv-ta-nv-hi; a-le i-ga-dv di-ga-lv-quo-di i-ga-dv-no di-ga-lv-quo-di ni-ge-sv-na.

160221.cherokee: ᎢᏳᏃ ᎩᎶ ᎤᏓᏅᎦᎸᏛ ᏱᎩ ᎯᎠ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎠᏖᎵᏙ ᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎦᎸᏉᏔᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᏱᏍᏛ ᎢᎬᏁᎸᎯ ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᎤᏩᏙᏗᏱ ᎦᏁᎳ; ᎠᎴ ᎠᏛᏅᎢᏍᏔᏅᎯ ᎾᎦᎥ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
160221.english: If a man therefore purge himself from these, he shall be a vessel unto honour, sanctified, and meet for the master's use, and prepared unto every good work.
160221.phonetic: I-yu-no gi-lo u-da-nv-ga-lv-dv yi-gi hi-a na-s-gi ge-sv-i, na-s-gi na a-te-li-do ga-lv-quo-di ge-se-s-di, ga-lv-quo-ta-nv-hi, a-le yi-s-dv i-gv-ne-lv-hi go-hu-s-di u-wa-do-di-yi ga-ne-la; a-le a-dv-nv-i-s-ta-nv-hi na-ga-v o-s-dv di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li.

160222.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᏕᎭᏓᏅᎡᎮᏍᏗ ᎩᎳ ᏗᎾᏛᏍᎩ ᎤᎾᏚᎸᏅᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎯᏍᏓᏩᏕᎨᏍᏗᏃ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᎠᏓᎨᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ, ᎠᎴ ᏅᏩᏙᎯᏯᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎢᏣᎵᎪᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮎ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᎾᏓᏙᎵᏍᏓᏁᎯ ᎤᎾᏫ ᎦᏓᎭ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎠᏅᏗᏍᎩ.
160222.english: Flee also youthful lusts: but follow righteousness, faith, charity, peace, with them that call on the Lord out of a pure heart.
160222.phonetic: A-le de-ha-da-nv-e-he-s-di gi-la di-na-dv-s-gi u-na-du-lv-nv-di ge-sv-i; hi-s-da-wa-de-ge-s-di-no du-yu-go-dv ge-sv, a-le go-hi-yu-di ge-sv, a-le a-da-ge-yu-di ge-sv, a-le nv-wa-do-hi-ya-dv ge-sv-i, i-tsa-li-go-se-s-di na-s-gi na U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-na-da-do-li-s-da-ne-hi u-na-wi ga-da-ha ni-ge-sv-na a-nv-di-s-gi.

160223.cherokee: ᏕᎭᏓᏅᎡᎮᏍᏗᏍᎩᏂ ᏄᎵᏌᎶᏛᎾ ᎠᎴ ᏅᎦᏔᎲᎾ ᏚᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎯᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᏗᏘᏲᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏩᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᎲᎢ.
160223.english: But foolish and unlearned questions avoid, knowing that they do gender strifes.
160223.phonetic: De-ha-da-nv-e-he-s-di-s-gi-ni nu-li-sa-lo-dv-na a-le nv-ga-ta-hv-na du-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv-i, hi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no di-ti-yo-s-di ge-sv wa-li-ye-i-lo-hi-hv-i.

160224.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏰᏃ ᎤᏅᏏᏓᏍᏗ ᎥᏝ ᏧᏘᏲᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᏧᎨᏳᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏱᎩ ᎾᏂᎥᎢ, ᏗᎬᏩᏕᏲᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᏱᎩ,
160224.english: And the servant of the Lord must not strive; but be gentle unto all men, apt to teach, patient,
160224.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-ye-no u-nv-si-da-s-di v-tla tsu-ti-yo-s-di yi-gi, tsu-ge-yu-hi-s-gi-ni yi-gi na-ni-v-i, di-gv-wa-de-yo-di yi-gi, gv-ni-di-yu yi-gi,

160225.cherokee: ᎤᏓᏅᏘ ᎬᏗᏍᎬ ᏱᎩ ᏕᎨᏲᎲᏍᎬ ᎬᏩᏡᏗᏍᎩ; ᎤᏚᎩ ᏳᏩᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏧᏁᏗᏱ ᏧᏂᏁᏟᏴᏍᏗᏱ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏧᎾᏓᏂᎸᎢᏍᏗᏱ ᎤᏙᎯᏳᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ;
160225.english: In meekness instructing those that oppose themselves; if God peradventure will give them repentance to the acknowledging of the truth;
160225.phonetic: U-da-nv-ti gv-di-s-gv yi-gi de-ge-yo-hv-s-gv gv-wa-tlu-di-s-gi; u-du-gi yu-wa-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi tsu-ne-di-yi tsu-ni-ne-tli-yv-s-di-yi du-na-da-nv-dv-i, a-le tsu-na-da-ni-lv-i-s-di-yi u-do-hi-yu-hi ge-sv-i;

160226.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏘᏐᏗᏱ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᎾᏚᏓᎴᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏍᎩᎾ ᎤᏌᏛᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎫᏴᎩᏅᎯ ᏥᎩ ᎤᏩᏒᏉ ᎠᏓᏅᏖᏍᎬ ᎢᏧᏩᏁᎸᎯ.
160226.english: And that they may recover themselves out of the snare of the devil, who are taken captive by him at his will.
160226.phonetic: A-le u-na-da-nv-ti-so-di-yi u-nv-sv u-na-du-da-le-s-di-yi a-s-gi-na u-sa-dv-i, na-s-gi gu-yv-gi-nv-hi tsi-gi u-wa-sv-quo a-da-nv-te-s-gv i-tsu-wa-ne-lv-hi.

160301.cherokee: ᎯᎠᏃ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎦᏔᎮᏍᏗ, ᎤᎵᏍᏆ ᎸᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᏎ ᎤᏕᏯᏙᏗ ᎤᎵᏰᎢᎶᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ.
160301.english: This know also, that in the last days perilous times shall come.
160301.phonetic: Hi-a-no na-s-quo hi-ga-ta-he-s-di, u-li-s-qua lv-di ge-se-s-di a-se u-de-ya-do-di u-li-ye-i-lo-hi-s-di ge-se-s-di.

160302.cherokee: ᏴᏫᏰᏃ ᎤᏅᏒ ᎤᎾᏓᎸᏉᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᎠᏕᎸ ᎤᏂᎬᎥᏍᎩ, ᎠᎾᏢᏆᏍᎩ, ᎤᎾᏢᏉᏗ, ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎬᏩᏂᏐᏢᏗ, ᏧᏂᎦᏴᎵᎨ ᏗᏂᎳᏏᏘᏍᎩ, ᏄᎾᎵᎮᎵᏣᏛᎾ, ᎠᏂᎦᏓᎭᎢ,
160302.english: For men shall be lovers of their own selves, covetous, boasters, proud, blasphemers, disobedient to parents, unthankful, unholy,
160302.phonetic: Yv-wi-ye-no u-nv-sv u-na-da-lv-quo-di-yu ge-se-s-di, a-de-lv u-ni-gv-v-s-gi, a-na-tlv-qua-s-gi, u-na-tlv-quo-di, U-ne-la-nv-hi gv-wa-ni-so-tlv-di, tsu-ni-ga-yv-li-ge di-ni-la-si-ti-s-gi, nu-na-li-he-li-tsa-dv-na, a-ni-ga-da-ha-i,

160303.cherokee: ᎪᎱᏍᏗ ᏧᏅᎾ ᏂᏚᏂᎨᏳᏒᎾ, ᏄᏃᎯᏍᏘᏒᎾ, ᎤᏐᏅ ᎠᎾᏓᏃᎮᎵᏙᎯ, ᏄᎾᎵᏏᎾᎯᏍᏛᎾ, ᎤᏂᎿᎭᎸᎯ, ᎠᏂᏍᎦᎩ ᎣᏍᏛ,
160303.english: Without natural affection, trucebreakers, false accusers, incontinent, fierce, despisers of those that are good,
160303.phonetic: Go-hu-s-di tsu-nv-na ni-du-ni-ge-yu-sv-na, nu-no-hi-s-ti-sv-na, u-so-nv a-na-da-no-he-li-do-hi, nu-na-li-si-na-hi-s-dv-na, u-ni-hna-lv-hi, a-ni-s-ga-gi o-s-dv,

160304.cherokee: ᎠᎾᏓᎶᏄᎮᏍᎩ, ᎤᏂᎫᏏᏯ, ᎤᎾᏓᎵᏌᎳᏗ, ᎤᏂᎨᏳᎯ ᏱᏍᏛ ᎤᎾᏓᏅᏓᏗᏍᏗᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯᏃ ᏄᏂᎨᏳᏒᎾ,
160304.english: Traitors, heady, highminded, lovers of pleasures more than lovers of God;
160304.phonetic: A-na-da-lo-nu-he-s-gi, u-ni-gu-si-ya, u-na-da-li-sa-la-di, u-ni-ge-yu-hi yi-s-dv u-na-da-nv-da-di-s-di-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi-no nu-ni-ge-yu-sv-na,

160305.cherokee: ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏁᎶᏙᏗ ᏗᏤᎵᏛ ᎤᏂᎯ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎠᎾᏓᏱᎯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏁᎶᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᏕᎭᏓᏅᎡᎮᏍᏗ.
160305.english: Having a form of godliness, but denying the power thereof: from such turn away.
160305.phonetic: U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ne-lo-do-di di-tse-li-dv u-ni-hi, a-se-no a-na-da-yi-hi U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ne-lo-do-di ge-sv-i.  Na-s-gi i-yu-na-s-di de-ha-da-nv-e-he-s-di.

160306.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩᏰᏃ ᎯᎠ ᎢᏳᎾᏍᏗ ᏥᏓᏂᏴᎵᏙᎰ ᏓᏓᏁᎸᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏥᏓᎾᏘᎾᏫᏗᏍᎪ ᏄᎾᏓᏅᏛᎾ ᎠᏂᎨᏴ ᎤᏂᎧᎵᏨᎯ ᎠᏍᎦᎾᎢ, ᏚᎾᏘᏂᏒ ᏧᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᎠᏚᎸᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ,
160306.english: For of this sort are they which creep into houses, and lead captive silly women laden with sins, led away with divers lusts,
160306.phonetic: Na-s-gi-ye-no hi-a i-yu-na-s-di tsi-da-ni-yv-li-do-ho da-da-ne-lv-i a-le tsi-da-na-ti-na-wi-di-s-go nu-na-da-nv-dv-na a-ni-ge-yv u-ni-ka-li-tsv-hi a-s-ga-na-i, du-na-ti-ni-sv tsu-da-le-nv-dv a-du-lv-di ge-sv-i,

160307.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎠᎾᏕᎶᏆᏍᎪᎢ, ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎢᎸᎯᏳ ᏱᏩᏂᏰᎢᎶᎯᎰ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎠᎦᏙᎥᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
160307.english: Ever learning, and never able to come to the knowledge of the truth.
160307.phonetic: Na-s-gi ni-go-hi-lv a-na-de-lo-qua-s-go-i, a-se-no v-tla i-lv-hi-yu yi-wa-ni-ye-i-lo-hi-ho du-yu-go-dv a-ga-do-v-hi-s-di ge-sv-i.

160308.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏤᏂ ᎠᎴ ᏨᏈ ᏣᎾᏡᏗᏍᎨ ᎼᏏ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎯᎠ ᎠᎾᏡᏗ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᏂᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏲᏨᎯ ᏚᎾᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᏲᎢᏎᏛ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᎬᏩᎵ.
160308.english: Now as Jannes and Jambres withstood Moses, so do these also resist the truth: men of corrupt minds, reprobate concerning the faith.
160308.phonetic: A-le na-s-gi-ya Tse-ni a-le Tsv-qui tsa-na-tlu-di-s-ge Mo-si na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo hi-a a-na-tlu-di du-yu-go-dv ge-sv-i; a-ni-s-ga-ya u-yo-tsv-hi du-na-da-nv-dv-i, a-le ge-tsi-yo-i-se-dv na-s-gi go-hi-yu-di ge-sv u-gv-wa-li.

160309.cherokee: ᎠᏎᏃ ᎥᏝ ᎤᏟ ᎢᏴᏛ ᎬᏩᏁᏅᏍᏗ ᏱᎩ, ᎾᏂᎦᏔᎿᎭᎥᎾᏰᏃ ᎨᏒ ᎬᏂᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᏳᎾᎵᏍᏓᏁᎵ ᎾᏂᎥᎢ, ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏥᏄᏍᏕ ᎾᏍᎩ.
160309.english: But they shall proceed no further: for their folly shall be manifest unto all men, as theirs also was.
160309.phonetic: A-se-no v-tla u-tli i-yv-dv gv-wa-ne-nv-s-di yi-gi, na-ni-ga-ta-hna-v-na-ye-no ge-sv gv-ni-ge-sv nv-da-yu-na-li-s-da-ne-li na-ni-v-i, na-s-gi-ya na-s-quo tsi-nu-s-de na-s-gi.

160310.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎣᏏᏳ ᏣᎦᏙᎥᏒ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏓᏆᏕᏲᏅᎢ, ᏄᏍᏛ ᎠᏆᎴᏂᏙᎸᎢ, ᏄᏍᏛ ᏓᏇᎪᏔᏅ ᏗᏆᏓᏅᏛᎢ, ᎠᏉᎯᏳᏒᎢ, ᎬᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᏆᏓᎨᏳᎯᏳ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎤᏁᎳᎩ ᎨᎵᏍᎬ ᏥᎩᎵᏲᎬᎢ,
160310.english: But thou hast fully known my doctrine, manner of life, purpose, faith, longsuffering, charity, patience,
160310.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni o-si-yu tsa-ga-do-v-sv nu-s-dv da-qua-de-yo-nv-i, nu-s-dv a-qua-le-ni-do-lv-i, nu-s-dv da-que-go-ta-nv di-qua-da-nv-dv-i, a-quo-hi-yu-sv-i, gv-ni-di-yu ge-sv-i, a-qua-da-ge-yu-hi-yu ge-sv-i, u-ne-la-gi ge-li-s-gv tsi-gi-li-yo-gv-i,

160311.cherokee: ᎤᏲ ᏅᏋᏁᎵᏙᎸᎢ, ᎠᎩᎩᎵᏲᏥᏙᎸᎢ ᎥᏘᎣᎩ, ᎢᎪᏂᏯ, ᎵᏍᏗ-ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏲ ᏅᏋᏁᎵᏙᎸᎢ; ᎠᏎᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᏂᎦᏛ ᎾᎿᎭᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏯᏓᎴᏒᎩ.
160311.english: Persecutions, afflictions, which came unto me at Antioch, at Iconium, at Lystra; what persecutions I endured: but out of them all the Lord delivered me.
160311.phonetic: U-yo nv-quv-ne-li-do-lv-i, a-gi-gi-li-yo-tsi-do-lv-i V-ti-o-gi, I-go-ni-ya, Li-s-di---ni-ga-v u-yo nv-quv-ne-li-do-lv-i; a-se-no na-s-gi ni-ga-dv na-hna U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-ya-da-le-sv-gi.

160312.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏚᎵᏍᎩ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᏗᏁᎶᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏂᏍᏓᏩᏛᏍᏗᏱ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎠᏃᎯᏳᎲᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᏗ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏎ ᎤᏲ ᎢᎨᎬᏁᏗ.
160312.english: Yea, and all that will live godly in Christ Jesus shall suffer persecution.
160312.phonetic: A-le na-s-quo na-ni-v u-na-du-li-s-gi U-ne-la-nv-hi di-ne-lo-do-di ge-sv u-ni-s-da-wa-dv-s-di-yi Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa a-no-hi-yu-hv-s-gi i-yu-na-dv-ne-di na-s-gi a-se u-yo i-ge-gv-ne-di.

160313.cherokee: ᎤᏂᏲᏍᎩᏂ ᏴᏫ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎾᏠᎾᏍᏗ ᎠᏂᏁᏉᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᏲ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᏓᏂᎶᎾᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᎨᏥᎶᎾᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
160313.english: But evil men and seducers shall wax worse and worse, deceiving, and being deceived.
160313.phonetic: U-ni-yo-s-gi-ni yv-wi a-le u-na-tlo-na-s-di a-ni-ne-quo-ge-s-di u-ni-yo ge-sv-i, da-ni-lo-na-s-di-s-ge-s-di a-le ge-tsi-lo-na-s-di-s-ge-s-di.

160314.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᏕᏣᏂᏴᏎᏍᏗ ᏄᏍᏛ ᏣᏕᎶᏆᎥᎢ ᎠᎴ ᏦᎯᏳᏅᎢ; ᎯᎦᏔᎭᏰᏃ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᏯᏕᎶᏆᎡᎸᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ,
160314.english: But continue thou in the things which thou hast learned and hast been assured of, knowing of whom thou hast learned them;
160314.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni de-tsa-ni-yv-se-s-di nu-s-dv tsa-de-lo-qua-v-i a-le tso-hi-yu-nv-i; hi-ga-ta-ha-ye-no na-s-gi hi-ya-de-lo-qua-e-lv-hi ge-sv-i,

160315.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎯᎦᏔᎭ ᏣᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏅᏓᎬᏩᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏕᎯᎦᏔᎲ ᏗᎦᎸᏉᏗ ᎪᏪᎵ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏰᎵ ᎯᎦᏔᎿᎭᎢᏳ ᎢᎬᏩᏁᏗ, ᏣᎵᏍᏕᎸᏙᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏫᎬᏩᎵᏱᎶᎯᏍᏗ, ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏥᏌ ᎯᏲᎢᏳᏒ ᎢᏳᏩᏂᏐᏗ.
160315.english: And that from a child thou hast known the holy scriptures, which are able to make thee wise unto salvation through faith which is in Christ Jesus.
160315.phonetic: A-le hi-ga-ta-ha tsa-s-di ge-sv nv-da-gv-wa-da-le-nv-dv de-hi-ga-ta-hv di-ga-lv-quo-di go-we-li, na-s-gi ye-li hi-ga-ta-hna-i-yu i-gv-wa-ne-di, tsa-li-s-de-lv-do-di ge-sv wi-gv-wa-li-yi-lo-hi-s-di, Ga-lo-ne-dv Tsi-sa hi-yo-i-yu-sv i-yu-wa-ni-so-di.

160316.cherokee: ᏂᎦᎥ ᎪᏪᎵ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏓᏅᏖᎸᎯ ᏗᎪᏪᎳᏅᎯ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎤᏓᏕᏲᏗᏱ, ᎤᏓᎬᏍᎪᎸᏗᏱ, ᎤᏓᎪᏗᏱ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ, ᎤᏓᏕᏲᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎨᏒᎢ,
160316.english: All scripture is given by inspiration of God, and is profitable for doctrine, for reproof, for correction, for instruction in righteousness:
160316.phonetic: Ni-ga-v go-we-li U-ne-la-nv-hi u-da-nv-te-lv-hi di-go-we-la-nv-hi, a-le o-si-yu u-da-de-yo-di-yi, u-da-gv-s-go-lv-di-yi, u-da-go-di-yi du-yu-go-dv-i, u-da-de-yo-di-yi o-s-dv ge-sv-i,

160317.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏍᎦᏯ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎤᏤᎵᎦ ᎤᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏱ, ᎤᏓᏁᎵᏌᏛ ᎢᏳᎵᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
160317.english: That the man of God may be perfect, throughly furnished unto all good works.
160317.phonetic: Na-s-gi a-s-ga-ya U-ne-la-nv-hi u-tse-li-ga u-s-qua-di-s-di-yi, u-da-ne-li-sa-dv i-yu-li-s-do-di-yi ni-ga-v o-s-dv di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i.

160401.cherokee: ᎾᏍᎩ ᎢᏳᏍᏗ ᎬᏁᏤᎭ ᎤᏁᎳᏅᎯ ᎠᎦᏔᎲᎢ ᎠᎴ ᎠᎦᏔᎲ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᏧᏭᎪᏓᏁᏗ ᏥᎩ ᏗᏅᏃᏛ ᎠᎴ ᏧᏂᏲᎱᏒᎯ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎦᎾᏄᎪᏥᎸᎭ ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎿᎭᏉ ᏂᎦᎵᏍᏔᏅᎭ,
160401.english: I charge thee therefore before God, and the Lord Jesus Christ, who shall judge the quick and the dead at his appearing and his kingdom;
160401.phonetic: Na-s-gi i-yu-s-di gv-ne-tse-ha U-ne-la-nv-hi a-ga-ta-hv-i a-le a-ga-ta-hv U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv, na-s-gi tsu-wu-go-da-ne-di tsi-gi di-nv-no-dv a-le tsu-ni-yo-hu-sv-hi na-hi-yu ga-na-nu-go-tsi-lv-ha a-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi hna-quo ni-ga-li-s-ta-nv-ha,

160402.cherokee: ᎭᎵᏥᏙᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎧᏃᎮᏛ, ᏣᎵᏁᏅᏕᏍᏗᏉ ᏰᎵ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎠᎴ ᏰᎵ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ, ᏕᎯᎬᏍᎪᎸᎥᏍᎨᏍᏗ, ᏕᎯᏍᎦᎨᏍᏗ, ᏕᎯᏍᏗᏰᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎲᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏣᏘ ᎬᏂᏛ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎴ ᏗᏕᏲᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
160402.english: Preach the word; be instant in season, out of season; reprove, rebuke, exhort with all longsuffering and doctrine.
160402.phonetic: Ha-li-tsi-do-hv-s-ge-s-di ka-no-he-dv, tsa-li-ne-nv-de-s-di-quo ye-li ge-se-s-di a-le ye-li ni-ge-sv-na ge-se-s-di, de-hi-gv-s-go-lv-v-s-ge-s-di, de-hi-s-ga-ge-s-di, de-hi-s-di-ye-di-s-ge-s-di hv-di-s-ge-s-di u-tsa-ti gv-ni-dv ge-sv a-le di-de-yo-di ge-sv-i.

160403.cherokee: ᏛᏍᏆᎸᎯᏰᏃ ᎿᎭᏉ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎥᏝ ᏳᎾᏚᎵᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᎾᏛᏓᏍᏙᏗᏱ ᎣᏍᏛ ᏗᏕᏲᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏚᏂᏲᏕᏍᎬᏍᎩᏂ ᏗᏂᎴᏂ ᎠᏅᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎤᏅᏒᏉ ᎤᎾᏚᎸᏅᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏓᏂᏍᏓᏩᏗᏒ ᏓᏂᏟᏏᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᎾᏕᏲᎲᏍᎩ;
160403.english: For the time will come when they will not endure sound doctrine; but after their own lusts shall they heap to themselves teachers, having itching ears;
160403.phonetic: Dv-s-qua-lv-hi-ye-no hna-quo na-hi-yu v-tla yu-na-du-li-s-ge-s-di u-na-dv-da-s-do-di-yi o-s-dv di-de-yo-di ge-sv-i; du-ni-yo-de-s-gv-s-gi-ni di-ni-le-ni a-nv-di-s-ge-s-di u-nv-sv-quo u-na-du-lv-nv-di ge-sv da-ni-s-da-wa-di-sv da-ni-tli-si-s-ge-s-di di-na-de-yo-hv-s-gi;

160404.cherokee: ᏗᏂᎴᏂᏃ ᏓᏂᎦᏔᎲᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᎠᎾᏛᎩᏍᎬ ᏚᏳᎪᏛᎢ, ᎠᏎᏉᏃ ᎦᏬᏂᎯᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎢᏗᏢ ᏩᎾᎦᏔᎲᏍᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ.
160404.english: And they shall turn away their ears from the truth, and shall be turned unto fables.
160404.phonetic: Di-ni-le-ni-no da-ni-ga-ta-hv-s-ge-s-di a-na-dv-gi-s-gv du-yu-go-dv-i, a-se-quo-no ga-wo-ni-hi-s-di ge-sv i-di-tlv wa-na-ga-ta-hv-s-di-s-ge-s-di.

160405.cherokee: ᏂᎯᏍᎩᏂ ᎮᏯᏔᎯᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎦᎥ ᏂᏣᏛᎿᎭᏕᎬᎢ, ᎲᏂᏗᏳ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎯᎩᎵᏲᎬᎢ, ᏕᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎮᏍᏗ ᎠᎵᏥᏙᏂᏙᎯ ᏧᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᏰᎵᎦᏯ ᎯᏍᏆᏗᏍᎨᏍᏗ ᏗᏣᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ.
160405.english: But watch thou in all things, endure afflictions, do the work of an evangelist, make full proof of thy ministry.
160405.phonetic: Ni-hi-s-gi-ni he-ya-ta-hi-yu ge-se-s-di ni-ga-v ni-tsa-dv-hna-de-gv-i, hv-ni-di-yu ge-se-s-di hi-gi-li-yo-gv-i, de-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-he-s-di a-li-tsi-do-ni-do-hi tsu-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i; ye-li-ga-ya hi-s-qua-di-s-ge-s-di di-tsa-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i.

160406.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏰᏃ ᎦᏓᎵᏍᎪᎸᏗᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎠᏇᏅᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎤᏍᏆᎸᎯᏗ.
160406.english: For I am now ready to be offered, and the time of my departure is at hand.
160406.phonetic: Hna-quo-ye-no ga-da-li-s-go-lv-di-ha, a-le na-hi-yu a-que-nv-s-di ge-sv u-s-qua-lv-hi-di.

160407.cherokee: ᎠᏆᎵᎸ ᎣᏍᏛ ᎠᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏛ ᎦᏙᎩᏯᏍᎬᎢ, ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏔᏅ ᎪᎯᏳᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ,
160407.english: I have fought a good fight, I have finished my course, I have kept the faith:
160407.phonetic: A-qua-li-lv o-s-dv a-li-s-di ge-sv-i, a-gi-s-qua-dv ga-do-gi-ya-s-gv-i, a-gi-s-qua-ni-go-ta-nv go-hi-yu-di ge-sv-i,

160408.cherokee: ᎿᎭᏉᏃ ᏨᏆᏓᏁᎳᏁᎸ ᎠᎵᏍᏚᎶ ᏚᏳᎪᏛ ᎢᏳᎾᏛᏁᎸᎯ ᎨᎦᎫᏴᏓᏁᏗ, ᎾᏍᎩ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎾᏍᎦᏅᎾ ᏗᎫᎪᏗᏍᎩ ᎠᏗᏅᏁᏗ ᎾᎯᏳ ᎢᎦ, ᎥᏝ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏴᏉ ᎠᏋᏒ, ᎾᏍᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎤᎾᏄᎪᎢᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᎣᏏᏳ ᎣᏂᏰᎸᎯ.
160408.english: Henceforth there is laid up for me a crown of righteousness, which the Lord, the righteous judge, shall give me at that day: and not to me only, but unto all them also that love his appearing.
160408.phonetic: Hna-quo-no tsv-qua-da-ne-la-ne-lv a-li-s-du-lo du-yu-go-dv i-yu-na-dv-ne-lv-hi ge-ga-gu-yv-da-ne-di, na-s-gi U-gv-wi-yu-hi na-s-ga-nv-na di-gu-go-di-s-gi a-di-nv-ne-di na-hi-yu i-ga, v-tla a-le a-yv-quo a-quv-sv, na-s-quo-s-gi-ni na-ni-v u-na-nu-go-i-s-di ge-sv o-si-yu o-ni-ye-lv-hi.

160409.english: Do thy diligence to come shortly unto me:

160410.cherokee: ᏗᎹᏰᏃ ᎠᏋᏕᏨ, ᏅᏗᎦᎵᏍᏙᏗᎭ ᎤᏟ ᎤᏰᎸᏅ ᎪᎯ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᏕᏏᎶᏂᎦ ᏭᎶᏒ; ᏞᏏᏂ ᎨᎴᏏᏱ ᏭᎶᏒ, ᏓᏓᏏ ᏕᎵᎺᏏᏱ ᏭᎶᏒ;
160410.english: For Demas hath forsaken me, having loved this present world, and is departed unto Thessalonica; Crescens to Galatia, Titus unto Dalmatia.
160410.phonetic: Di-ma-ye-no a-quv-de-tsv, nv-di-ga-li-s-do-di-ha u-tli u-ye-lv-nv go-hi ge-sv-i, a-le De-si-lo-ni-ga wu-lo-sv; Tle-si-ni Ge-le-si-yi wu-lo-sv, Da-da-si De-li-me-si-yi wu-lo-sv;

160411.cherokee: ᎷᎦ ᎤᏩᏒ ᎣᏍᏕᏙᎭ; ᎹᎦ ᏘᏯᏗᏁᏒᎭ, ᎬᎩᏍᏕᎸᎯᏓᏍᏗᏰᏃ ᏓᎩᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎲᎢ.
160411.english: Only Luke is with me. Take Mark, and bring him with thee: for he is profitable to me for the ministry.
160411.phonetic: Lu-ga u-wa-sv o-s-de-do-ha; Ma-ga ti-ya-di-ne-sv-ha, gv-gi-s-de-lv-hi-da-s-di-ye-no da-gi-lv-wi-s-da-ne-hv-i.

160412.english: And Tychicus have I sent to Ephesus.

160413.cherokee: ᎦᏌᎴᎾ ᏠᏯ ᏨᏛᎩᏂᏴᎩ ᎦᏆ ᎦᏁᎸᎢ ᏖᏒ ᏘᏁᏒᎭ, ᎠᎴ ᎪᏪᎵ ᏙᏘᏁᏒᎭ ᎾᏍᎩ Ꮀ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᏎᏍᏗ ᎦᏁᎦ ᏗᎪᏪᎶᏗ.
160413.english: The cloke that I left at Troas with Carpus, when thou comest, bring with thee, and the books, but especially the parchments.
160413.phonetic: Ga-sa-le-na Tlo-ya tsv-dv-gi-ni-yv-gi Ga-qua ga-ne-lv-i te-sv ti-ne-sv-ha, a-le go-we-li do-ti-ne-sv-ha na-s-gi ho u-gv-wi-yu-se-s-di ga-ne-ga di-go-we-lo-di.

160414.cherokee: ᎡᎵᎩ ᎥᏣᏱ ᎪᏢᏅᎥᏍᎩ ᎤᎶᏘ ᏃᏒᎾ ᎾᏋᏁᎸᎩ.  ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎤᎫᏴᎡᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᎾᏍᎩᏯ ᏕᎤᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᎸᎢ.
160414.english: Alexander the coppersmith did me much evil: the Lord reward him according to his works:
160414.phonetic: E-li-gi v-tsa-yi go-tlv-nv-v-s-gi u-lo-ti no-sv-na na-quv-ne-lv-gi.  U-gv-wi-yu-hi u-gu-yv-e-di ge-se-s-di na-s-gi-ya de-u-lv-wi-s-da-ne-lv-i.

160415.cherokee: ᎾᏍᏉ ᏂᎯ ᎾᏍᎩ ᎯᏰᏯᏙᏤᎮᏍᏗ, ᎤᎵᏂᎩᏗᏳᏰᏃ ᎤᏡᏔᏅ ᎣᏥᏬᏂᏍᎬᎢ.
160415.english: Of whom be thou ware also; for he hath greatly withstood our words.
160415.phonetic: Na-s-quo ni-hi na-s-gi hi-ye-ya-do-tse-he-s-di, u-li-ni-gi-di-yu-ye-no u-tlu-ta-nv o-tsi-wo-ni-s-gv-i.

160416.cherokee: ᎢᎬᏱᏱ ᎠᎩᏬᏂᏒ ᎦᎵᏍᏕᎵᏍᎬ ᎥᏝ ᎩᎶ ᎾᎥ ᏱᎦᏙᎨᎢ, ᎾᏂᎥᏉᏍᎩᏂ ᎬᏆᏕᏨᎩ; ᏞᏍᏗ ᎤᏂᏍᎦᏅᏨ ᏱᏚᏚᎪᏔᏁᏍᏗ;
160416.english: At my first answer no man stood with me, but all men forsook me: I pray God that it may not be laid to their charge.
160416.phonetic: I-gv-yi-yi a-gi-wo-ni-sv ga-li-s-de-li-s-gv v-tla gi-lo na-v yi-ga-do-ge-i, na-ni-v-quo-s-gi-ni gv-qua-de-tsv-gi; tle-s-di u-ni-s-ga-nv-tsv yi-du-du-go-ta-ne-s-di;

160417.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯᏍᎩᏂᏃᏅ ᎾᎥ ᎦᏙᎬᎩ ᎠᎴ ᎠᏆᎵᏂᎪᎯᏍᏔᏅᎩ; ᎾᏍᎩ ᎠᏴ ᎨᏒ ᎠᎩᏍᏆᏗᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏰᎸᏒᎩ ᎠᎵᏥᏙᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᏧᎾᏓᎴᏅᏛ ᏴᏫ ᎤᎾᏛᎯᏗᏱ; ᎠᎴ ᎥᎩᎴᏒᎩ ᏢᏓᏥ ᎠᎰᎵ ᏥᎳᎥᎢ.
160417.english: Notwithstanding the Lord stood with me, and strengthened me; that by me the preaching might be fully known, and that all the Gentiles might hear: and I was delivered out of the mouth of the lion.
160417.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi-s-gi-ni-no-nv na-v ga-do-gv-gi a-le a-qua-li-ni-go-hi-s-ta-nv-gi; na-s-gi a-yv ge-sv a-gi-s-qua-di-s-di-yi a-ye-lv-sv-gi a-li-tsi-do-di ge-sv-i, a-le na-ni-v tsu-na-da-le-nv-dv yv-wi u-na-dv-hi-di-yi; a-le v-gi-le-sv-gi tlv-da-tsi a-ho-li tsi-la-v-i.

160418.cherokee: ᎠᎴ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᎠᏎ ᏛᏇᏓᎴᏏ ᏂᎦᎥ ᎤᏲ ᏗᎦᎸᏫᏍᏓᏁᏗ ᎨᏒᎢ; ᎠᎴ ᏛᎩᏍᏆᏂᎪᏔᏂ ᎦᎸᎳᏗ ᎡᎯ ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏗᎨᏒ ᏫᎦᎷᎩ.  ᎾᏍᎩ ᎦᎸᏉᏙᏗ ᎨᏎᏍᏗ ᏂᎪᎯᎸ ᎠᎴ ᏂᎪᎯᎸᎢ, ᎡᎺᏅ.
160418.english: And the Lord shall deliver me from every evil work, and will preserve me unto his heavenly kingdom: to whom be glory for ever and ever. Amen.
160418.phonetic: A-le U-gv-wi-yu-hi a-se dv-que-da-le-si ni-ga-v u-yo di-ga-lv-wi-s-da-ne-di ge-sv-i; a-le dv-gi-s-qua-ni-go-ta-ni ga-lv-la-di e-hi u-gv-wi-yu-hi di-ge-sv wi-ga-lu-gi.  Na-s-gi ga-lv-quo-do-di ge-se-s-di ni-go-hi-lv a-le ni-go-hi-lv-i, E-me-nv.

160419.cherokee: ᎩᏲᎵᎸᎭ ᏈᏍᎦ ᎠᎴ ᎡᏈᎳ, ᎠᎴ ᎣᏁᏏᏉᎳ ᏚᏓᏘᎾᎥᎢ.
160419.english: Salute Prisca and Aquila, and the household of Onesiphorus.
160419.phonetic: Gi-yo-li-lv-ha Qui-s-ga a-le E-qui-la, a-le O-ne-si-quo-la du-da-ti-na-v-i.

160420.cherokee: ᎢᎳᏍᏓ ᎪᎴᏂᏗ ᏓᏳᏗᎩᏴᎩ, ᏠᏆᎹᏍᎩᏂ ᎹᎵᏓ ᏓᏥᏯᎧᎯᏴᎩ ᎤᏢᎩ.
160420.english: Erastus abode at Corinth: but Trophimus have I left at Miletum sick.
160420.phonetic: I-la-s-da Go-le-ni-di da-yu-di-gi-yv-gi, Tlo-qua-ma-s-gi-ni Ma-li-da da-tsi-ya-ka-hi-yv-gi u-tlv-gi.

160421.cherokee: ᎭᏟᏂᎬᏁᎸᎭ ᎠᏂ ᏣᎷᎯᏍᏗᏱ ᎠᏏᏉ ᎪᎳ ᏂᎨᏒᎾ.  ᏳᏇᎳ ᏫᏣᏲᎵᎦ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏍᏉ ᏇᏗᏂ, ᎠᎴ ᎳᎾᏏ, ᎠᎴ ᏠᏗᏯ, ᎠᎴ ᎾᏂᎥ ᎠᎾᎵᏅᏟ.
160421.english: Do thy diligence to come before winter. Eubulus greeteth thee, and Pudens, and Linus, and Claudia, and all the brethren.
160421.phonetic: Ha-tli-ni-gv-ne-lv-ha a-ni tsa-lu-hi-s-di-yi a-si-quo go-la ni-ge-sv-na.  Yu-que-la wi-tsa-yo-li-ga, a-le na-s-quo Que-di-ni, a-le la-na-si, a-le Tlo-di-ya, a-le na-ni-v a-na-li-nv-tli.

160422.cherokee: ᎤᎬᏫᏳᎯ ᏥᏌ ᎦᎶᏁᏛ ᏓᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ ᏩᏓᏅᏙ.  ᎤᏓᏙᎵᏍᏗ ᎨᏒ ᏕᏣᎧᎿᎭᏩᏗᏙᎮᏍᏗ.  ᎡᎺᏅ.
160422.english: The Lord Jesus Christ be with thy spirit. Grace be with you. Amen.
160422.phonetic: U-gv-wi-yu-hi Tsi-sa Ga-lo-ne-dv da-ka-hna-wa-di-do-he-s-di wa-da-nv-do.  U-da-do-li-s-di ge-sv de-tsa-ka-hna-wa-di-do-he-s-di.  E-me-nv.
